allow: PowerShell($exe = "$env:ProgramFiles\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"; if\(Test-Path $exe\){ Start-Process $exe; "Iniciando Docker Desktop..." } else { "Docker Desktop.exe nao encontrado em $exe" })

PowerShell($f = Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($f\) { $f.Source } else { Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\","$env:LOCALAPPDATA","$env:USERPROFILE" -Filter "flutter.bat" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 5 | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName })
Bash(ssh -i /c/Users/pc/.ssh/oneclick_deploy -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@72.60.155.69 'echo CONNECTED_OK')
Bash(ssh -vv -i /c/Users/pc/.ssh/oneclick_deploy -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@72.60.155.69 'echo OK')
Bash(ssh -i /c/Users/pc/.ssh/oneclick_deploy -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@72.60.155.69 ' *)

PowerShell($procs = Get-Process -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'java|dart|gradle' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, @{N='CPU\(s\)';E={[int]$_.CPU}}, @{N='Mem\(MB\)';E={[int]\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}}; if \($procs\) { $procs | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String } else { "no java/dart/gradle running" })
